summary: Completed full testing of new Historical Test Comparison feature. All features working correctly - history panel, table, row selection, comparison charts, and service breakdown comparison all functional. Backend APIs verified with pytest. Previously working features (latency breakdown, bottleneck analysis, pie chart, statistics) confirmed working.
passed_tests: Live Testing tab shows test controls (profile selection, Run Test button)
Test History & Comparison collapsible panel exists (data-testid='test-history-panel')
History table (data-testid='history-table') shows entries with Profile, Time, Sent, Recv, Avg, p95, Throughput, Bottleneck columns
Row selection works - clicking row shows green checkbox and highlights row
Comparison bar chart appears when run selected showing Min/Avg/p95/Max bars with legend
Service Breakdown Comparison stacked bar chart appears showing Compute, I/O, Lambda Trigger, Queue Wait, SQS Accept, SQS Delivery
Multiple rows can be selected (up to 4) and comparison chart updates
Previously working: Latency stacked bar (data-testid='latency-stacked-bar') displays correctly
Previously working: Bottleneck analysis (data-testid='bottleneck-analysis') shows primary bottleneck, concurrency status, recommendation
Previously working: Latency Distribution pie chart displays with <500ms, 500-1000ms, >1000ms breakdown
Previously working: Statistics panel shows Minimum/Average/Median/95th Percentile/Maximum/Throughput
Backend: GET /api/test-history returns list of past test runs with correct structure
Backend: POST /api/test runs test and auto-saves to history with latency_breakdown and bottleneck_analysis
Backend: POST /api/heartbeat for PC management working
seed_data_creation: None required - tests run against real AWS services which auto-create test data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Historical Test Comparison feature fully verified. Key data-testid attributes: test-history-panel, toggle-history-btn, history-table, latency-stacked-bar, bottleneck-analysis. Backend API /api/test-history working correctly for GET, DELETE. Test runs auto-save to MongoDB history. UI supports selecting up to 4 runs for side-by-side comparison with bar charts.

verified_elements: Stacked bar chart when latency_breakdown data exists
